place: Plai Laem, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Hillside Villa with Horizon-Edge Pool, Cinema & Spa Room, Plai Laem
blurb: A six-bedroom hillside villa above Koh Samui's north-eastern coast with over 1,200 m² of living space and an outstanding roster of facilities — a horizon-edge infinity pool, a poolside BBQ sala, a private cinema, gym, games room, spa treatment room and yoga deck, with six en-suite king bedrooms all opening to the sea.
detail:
Elevated above Koh Samui's north-eastern coastline, this six-bedroom hillside villa pairs panoramic ocean views with an outstanding collection of facilities — private yet just minutes from Choeng Mon's calm bay and Chaweng's lively dining and nightlife. Its centrepiece is a horizon-edge infinity pool flanked by sun terraces, shaded lounges and a rooftop deck, with a poolside BBQ sala and al fresco dining for long lunches and starlit evenings.

Indoors, an air-conditioned sea-view lounge and open living areas deliver comfort and style in equal measure. Each of the six en-suite bedrooms is conceived as a private retreat, finished with elegant textures and opening onto terraces or balconies that invite in the sea breeze. The layout balances generous shared spaces with quiet corners for downtime, making it ideal for families or groups travelling together.

Entertainment and leisure sit at the heart of the home: a private cinema seats the whole group for movie nights, a gym keeps routines on track, and the games room is stocked with table tennis, PlayStation, Wii U and board games. A dedicated yoga deck offers a tranquil space for sunrise stretches, and a spa treatment room brings wellness in-house. For dining, a designer kitchen — two professional kitchens in all — and the poolside BBQ sala make every meal an occasion.

With over 1,200 m² of living space, the villa is large enough for any occasion. A dedicated villa manager and resident team look after the stay, with a full-service kitchen and bar, Nuvo sound system throughout, private parking, full backup generators and uniformed security.

features.l: Poolside BBQ sala & al fresco dining

place: Plai Laem, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Hillside Villa with L-Shaped Infinity Pool, Cinema & Gym, Plai Laem
blurb: A five-bedroom hillside retreat above Koh Samui's north-eastern coast, pairing expansive living with panoramic Gulf views — its centrepiece an L-shaped infinity pool long enough for laps, wrapped by terraces and a shaded sala, with a private cinema, gym and games room, and five en-suite king bedrooms that all face the sea.
detail:
Elevated above Koh Samui's north-eastern shoreline, this five-bedroom hillside retreat combines expansive living with panoramic coastal views — secluded and comfortable, yet keeping Choeng Mon and Chaweng's beaches, dining and nightlife within easy reach. Its centrepiece is an L-shaped infinity pool, long enough for athletic laps and perfectly positioned to frame the horizon.

Expansive terraces and shaded outdoor pavilions surround the pool, creating spaces for sunbathing, lounging or barbecues in the outdoor sala, with landscaped gardens softening the striking architecture. Three distinct social areas anchor the home — a sala for BBQs, a curved sofa for cocktails and conversation, and more — while the open-plan design lets guests gather in groups or retreat to quieter corners.

Three lounge areas include a private cinema with projector and surround sound, a TV lounge and a quiet office space. Each of the five en-suite bedrooms is a private sanctuary with a king bed, oversized bathtub or rain shower and direct ocean views, sleeping up to ten adults with options for children. A private gym and table tennis round out the active spaces.

A resident team looks after the stay, with a full-service kitchen and bar, a Nuvo sound system throughout, an outdoor BBQ, private parking, full backup generators and uniformed security — a polished, sociable estate moments from the island's best beaches.

features.l: L-shaped infinity pool over the Gulf

place: Plai Laem, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Hillside Estate Villa with 25m Infinity Pool, Commercial Gym & Cinema, Plai Laem
blurb: An extraordinary seven-bedroom hillside estate on Koh Samui's north-eastern coast, built for gatherings on a grand scale — one of the island's largest infinity pools at 25 metres, a commercial-grade gym, a private cinema and a games room, with panoramic ocean views and seven en-suite bedrooms, five with their own jacuzzis.
detail:
Perched majestically on the hillside above Koh Samui's north-eastern coastline, this contemporary seven-bedroom estate takes villa living to a whole new level — panoramic ocean views, one of the island's largest infinity pools, and grand entertaining spaces in a setting that feels both secluded and connected, minutes from the island's beaches, restaurants and nightlife.

The centrepiece is a 25-metre infinity-edge pool wrapped by expansive decks, a rooftop sun deck and landscaped gardens — endless room for lazy afternoons in the sun and sunset dinners beneath the stars. Open-plan lounges and dining areas form a welcoming heart, while multiple pavilions and quiet corners let guests gather together or slip away for privacy. Each of the seven en-suite bedrooms is a private sanctuary — five with their own jacuzzis — finished with elegant materials, generous layouts and terrace or balcony access.

The villa is built for sociable living: a commercial-grade gym with professional equipment, a private cinema, and a games room with pool table, table football, table tennis, retro arcade, PlayStation, Xbox and Wii. Beyond, a practice basketball court, an outdoor trampoline, a yoga pavilion, a massage sala and meditation nests. A centralised sound system, full-service kitchen, poolside BBQ and sunset cocktail deck complete the picture, with seven king bedrooms sleeping fourteen adults (extra bed and crib available).

A resident team looks after the stay, with a full-service kitchen, private underground parking, full backup generators and uniformed security — a turn-key estate for a large family or group seeking space, privacy and resort-grade facilities steps from the sea.

place: Chaweng Noi Hills, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Chaweng Noi Hilltop Villa with Infinity Pool, Cinema & Games Room
blurb: A modern multi-level villa perched in the Chaweng Noi hills with a wraparound terrace and an infinity pool framing Chaweng Beach and Koh Phangan beyond — four en-suite king bedrooms, a private cinema, a games room with full bar, and a five-star butler-and-chef team.
detail:
Perched majestically in the prestigious Chaweng Noi hills, this contemporary four-bedroom villa is a study in indoor-outdoor island living, opening to panoramic views that sweep from the vibrant curve of Chaweng Beach to the serene silhouette of Koh Phangan. A wide cantilevered terrace and an infinity-edge pool anchor the home, with a vast sun deck, daybeds and a covered sanctuary for shaded afternoons above the sea.

Inside, a large air-conditioned living space is layered with plush seating, fine art and wall-mounted screens, flowing to a fully equipped Western show kitchen. Entertainment runs deep: a private cinema, a games room with pool, ping-pong and foosball tables, a full-size arcade, karaoke upstairs and down, a PlayStation 5 and an in-house bar — plus Sonos throughout, a stocked wine fridge and a garden with a tranquil waterfall and Buddha.

Four en-suite double bedrooms each have king beds and the master enjoys spectacular sea views from one of the largest bathrooms on the island. A five-star resident team looks after the stay — villa manager, butler service, housekeeping and an experienced private chef preparing Thai and international menus from breakfast onward. Families are welcome with a shallow pool end, high chair and pool toys, and Chaweng Noi beach is a five-minute walk with restaurants, bakeries and shops moments away.

place: Seaside Society, Southwest Lombok, West Nusa Tenggara, Indonesia
title: Elevated Sea-View Villa with Infinity Pool & Yoga Deck, Lombok
blurb: An architect-designed hillside retreat on Lombok's quiet southwest coast — bold lines and a vivid mix of materials framing sweeping ocean, rice-field and sunset views. Four en-suite bedrooms, a 74 m² infinity pool with a shallow children's section, and a dedicated yoga deck.
detail:
An elevated retreat surrounded by lush greenery on Lombok's tranquil southwest coast, this architect-designed villa (by Cáceres + Tous) offers unrivalled ocean and rice-field views with some of the island's most spectacular sunsets. Across 949 m² — 177 m² of indoor living wrapped in 772 m² of terraces and gardens — the bold lines and vivid combination of materials make the four-bedroom home feel at once grand and serene, conceived for retreats, slow living and multi-generational stays.

A multifunctional yoga space greets you at the entrance, setting the calm tone, while each of the four bedrooms has its own en-suite bathroom and a double bed. Expansive open social areas flow effortlessly between gathering and rest, opening to vast terraces and outdoor seating with uninterrupted views of the sea and the rice fields. At the centre, a 74 m² infinity pool with a shallow section for children and a pool shower invites long, light-filled days; after sundown the villa is spectacularly illuminated for an enchanting evening atmosphere.

Stays come fully serviced with daily breakfast, housekeeping, turndown and 24-hour security, with in-villa dining, spa treatments, transportation, tailored activities and a sports centre available on request — a private, design-led base within an established seaside community in Sekotong, southwest Lombok.

place: Samsara Estate, Kamala, Kathu District, Phuket 83150, Thailand
title: Scandinavian-Modern Oceanfront Villa with 15-Metre Infinity Pool, Kamala
blurb: The most modern villa in Phuket's exclusive Samsara estate — a direct-oceanfront retreat 50 metres above the Andaman, where Scandinavian design meets bold art, floor-to-ceiling glass retracts to the sea, and a 15-metre infinity pool runs toward a west-facing sunset sala.
detail:
Perched in a direct oceanfront position 50 metres above the Andaman Sea within Kamala's exclusive Samsara estate, Oceanview Retreat is the estate's most contemporary home — a confident blend of Scandinavian design and bold contemporary art across expansive, light-filled living spaces. Retractable floor-to-ceiling doors open every room to panoramic sea views, dissolving the line between the interiors and the horizon.

The upper level holds the open-plan kitchen and living areas that flow out to a 15-metre infinity-edge pool overlooking the water, with a covered west-facing sala for sunsets, an outdoor whirlpool, a shaded alfresco BBQ and dining area, sun loungers and a daybed. Downstairs, a private bar, a media lounge with a 65-inch screen and a games room with a pool table make entertaining effortless.

All five bedrooms sit on the garden level, including a master suite with a wraparound terrace and an ocean-view jacuzzi; a fifth room with Murphy beds flexes for children or extra guests. Designed for adult groups, families and corporate retreats, it pairs high-end amenities — home office, smart TVs, fast Wi-Fi — with private-chef and concierge services on request, minutes from Kamala Beach.

features.l: Direct oceanfront, 50 m above the sea

place: Lamai, Tambon Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84310, Thailand
title: Twin-Villa Beachfront Estate Framed by Granite Boulders, Lamai
note: Two villas · a private chef each
blurb: A private coastal estate of rare distinction on Koh Samui's unspoilt Lamai–Hua Thanon shore — two iconic villas, Baan Hinta and Baan Hinyai, set among dramatic granite boulders and coconut palms, with twin 20-metre infinity pools, ten sea-view bedrooms and an outdoor cinema by the sand.
detail:
Hinta Hinyai Beach Villas pairs two iconic homes — Baan Hinta and Baan Hinyai — along Koh Samui's unspoilt Lamai–Hua Thanon shoreline, framed by granite boulders, coconut palms and uninterrupted ocean vistas in a setting both dramatic and deeply serene. Bookable together as a single fully-staffed estate for up to twenty guests across ten bedrooms, or villa by villa, it is built for multi-generational escapes and refined group gatherings.

Each villa is laid out as a pavilion-style composition that celebrates seamless indoor-outdoor living, with natural light and sea breezes flowing throughout — and no cookie-cutter rooms: every bedroom has a sea view and a unique layout shaped around the surrounding rock formations, each with its own freestanding bathtub. Days gather around open-plan dining rooms and high-ceilinged living rooms, then move outdoors to terraces and infinity pools (a 19.7-metre at Baan Hinta, a 20-metre at Baan Hinyai) with kid-friendly shallow ends, daybeds and sunset views.

Kayaks, SUP boards and a table-tennis table are on hand for the active; a dedicated team — villa manager, private chef, housekeeper and handymen at each villa — looks after the rest. As evening falls, chef-prepared dinners give way to cinematic nights under the stars beneath Baan Hinta's poolside projector screen, the famous Hin Ta and Hin Yai rocks just along the coast.

features.l: Two villas · a private chef each

place: Bophut Hills, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Sea-View Hilltop Villa with Tennis Court & Boxing Ring, Bophut
blurb: The crown jewel of the Panacea Retreat — a six-bedroom hilltop villa with unobstructed panoramic sea views, a 25-metre infinity pool, and a rare depth of recreation: private cinema, games room, gym, sauna, a full tennis court and even a Muay Thai boxing ring.
detail:
One of Koh Samui's finest private retreats, this is a stunning six-bedroom villa set into the Bophut hills with panoramic, unobstructed sea views — the jewel in the crown of the Panacea Retreat. You enter via stepping stones over a koi pond, passing tall Buddha statues set into a stone-clad wall, into a stylish two-storey central building whose upper level holds a vast, glass-walled lounge and dining room beneath a cascading glass chandelier, framing a backdrop of seascape and tropical forest.

Each of the three master bedrooms occupies its own standalone pavilion, all with dramatic sea and island views from king-size beds, glass-walled rain showers, a private rooftop garden with a terrazzo bathtub and terrace — and one with its own 12-metre pool. Rooms slide open onto a wide terrace above the garden and the enticing 25-metre infinity pool that overflows toward the horizon, with a poolside sala and sunset sala alongside.

What sets it apart is the sheer range of recreation: a gym kitted with rowing, cycling, running machines and weights; a games room with pool table; a private cinema with ten La-Z-Boy chairs; a children's playroom and kids' club; a wine cellar and night-club room; a sauna and steam room; a dedicated spa; a private tennis court; and a Muay Thai boxing ring. Across roughly 3,200 m² and three floors, it sleeps up to fourteen, fully staffed with villa manager, housekeeping and meals from Panacea's central kitchen — a singular setting for celebrations and events for up to sixty guests.

features.l: 25 m infinity pool + private 12 m pool
Private tennis court & Muay Thai ring

place: Koh Koon, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Rock-Clad Mediterranean Hillside Villa with Twin Pools, Chaweng
blurb: A sprawling hillside estate above Chaweng Bay where Eastern and Mediterranean design meet — natural rock-clad pavilions and boulder-studded gardens linked by stone pathways, an infinity pool and a second pool, a games room and outdoor cinema, for groups of up to twenty-two.
detail:
Set on a sprawling hillside with a view of Chaweng Bay, Villa Koh Koon is a study in eclectic, comfortable luxury — its architecture and décor a harmonious blend of Eastern and Mediterranean styles. Built to merge with its surroundings, the main buildings are clad in natural rock with huge boulders accenting the garden, and stone pathways wind through lush lawns to connect the pavilions; French-farmhouse design notes meet the swaying coconut palms of the tropics.

The open-plan living and kitchen — Smeg appliances, a library and business room up a feature staircase, seating for eighteen at the dining table — flows to a travertine terrace with soft seating and gauzy curtains, and on to an infinity pool ringed by a wooden deck, a wet bar and a shaded sala with a projector screen for movie nights. A second pool, expansive lawns and a yoga deck extend the grounds, while a games room with pool table, dartboard and foosball handles the evenings.

Up to twenty-two guests are hosted across nine en-suite bedrooms — bookable as seven, eight or nine — including a sea-view master connected to the library with a private terrace and outdoor shower, six guest rooms across four pavilions, and two children's rooms. A team of five, including a private chef, looks after the stay, with daily breakfast and return airport transfers included; Samui Airport is fourteen minutes away and Chaweng Noi beach just four.

place: Chaweng Beach, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Beachfront Villa with 23-Metre Lap Pool & Private Clubhouse, Chaweng
blurb: A beachfront retreat at the quiet northern tip of Chaweng, facing Matlang Island — 860 m² of pavilion living, a 23-metre lap pool with a sunken sala, a spacious shorefront lawn and access to a private clubhouse with gym, cinema, spa and kids' club.
detail:
At the tip of Chaweng Beach, set directly on the sand and facing little Matlang Island, this is a beachfront escape that merges modern luxury with tropical charm. Across 860 m² of elegant living it accommodates up to sixteen guests in six bedrooms, each with a king bed, Smart TV and a private en-suite — several with open-air outdoor bathtubs — making it a natural fit for families and groups, with the flexibility to book four, five or six bedrooms.

The heart of the villa is a 23-metre lap pool with a shallow children's area, framed by eight sun loungers and a shaded sunken sala for long afternoons. Indoor and covered outdoor living and dining areas each seat twelve, served by a fully equipped kitchen and BBQ, with Bluetooth sound throughout and a generous beachfront lawn opening straight to the sea.

Guests also enjoy a private clubhouse with a fully equipped gym, kids' club, cinema, spa and sauna. A team of four — villa manager, private chef and housekeeping — looks after the stay, with daily breakfast, return airport transfers and a complimentary massage for bookings of four bedrooms or more. Samui Airport is four minutes away and Chaweng's restaurants and shopping just around the headland.

place: Bophut Bay, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Four-Villa Beachfront Compound with Sixteen Pools, Bophut
blurb: A rare beachfront compound of four interconnecting villas on Bophut Bay — twenty en-suite bedrooms, sixteen private and infinity pools, direct sand access and a full concierge team, conceived for extended families, reunions and large groups who want an entire stretch of coast to themselves.
detail:
Set directly on the sand of Bophut Bay on Koh Samui's calm north coast, this is one of the island's largest private beachfront estates — four individually designed villas that can be booked together as a single gated compound for extended families, multi-generational celebrations and large groups of friends. Together they sleep up to forty guests across twenty en-suite bedrooms, with the flexibility to open or close wings to suit the party.

The estate's defining luxury is water: sixteen swimming and infinity pools thread between the villas and the beachfront, alongside expansive sun decks, shaded salas and lawns that run to the shoreline. Vast open-plan living and dining pavilions, multiple fully equipped kitchens and indoor-outdoor lounges give every group its own gathering space, while the absolute beachfront setting means warm, swimmable sea just beyond the deck.

A full resident team looks after the stay end to end — estate manager, private chefs, housekeeping, security and a dedicated concierge for transfers, excursions, in-villa dining and events. Daily breakfast, high-speed WiFi and the run of the grounds are included, with Fisherman's Village dining and Bophut's restaurants a short drive away and the airport around twenty minutes from the gate.

place: Nathon, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Cliff-Hanging Infinity-Pool Sports Villa, Nathon
blurb: A sport-and-leisure retreat built into the Nathon hillside, where a 14-metre infinity pool hangs over the cliff edge above the Gulf — every room framing the sea, an indoor gym, putting green and a full games lawn waiting just beyond the deck.
detail:
Built onto the Nathon hillside with a breathtaking panorama of the surrounding vistas and sea, this is an exclusive hideaway conceived for large groups who want for nothing. An opulent entrance leads past a pond and tropical garden, through an ornate hand-carved wooden door from Chiang Mai, and opens to an indoor living room with a pool table and a dining space for ten — which in turn spills out to the deck, the pool and the spectacular surroundings beyond.

The headline is a 14-metre infinity pool that appears to spill straight off the cliff toward the horizon, with sun beds lined along its edge and a master-suite jacuzzi above. While the view from every room is one of nature's finest works, the villa's amenities compete for attention: an indoor gym, a putting green, a lawn marked out for badminton, volleyball or football, and even a petanque boulodrome for target bowling.

Arranged over two floors with three to six-plus mezzanine bedrooms, the home suits multi-generational gatherings, reunions and intimate weddings of up to twenty. A villa manager, private chef and housekeeping team look after the stay, with a welcome drink, daily breakfast and high-speed WiFi throughout — and Bang Por's quiet beaches and the north-shore restaurants only a short drive away.

place: Dhevatara Residence, Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Pavilion Beachfront Villa with Overwater Sala, Bophut
blurb: A beachfront cluster of air-conditioned pavilions on Bophut's golden shore — a 12-metre infinity pool, a Thai-style sala reached by overwater steps for sunrise mornings, and a four-poster master that opens to a soaking tub for two, three minutes from the sand.
detail:
Set within the Dhevatara Residence estate on Bophut Beach, this is a stylish 1,247 m² beachfront retreat composed as a series of air-conditioned pavilions with rich wooden accents, airy interiors and floor-to-ceiling glass doors that draw in the light and sea air. Overwater steps lead to a charming sala — a Thai-style gazebo perfect for admiring Samui's golden sunrise — beside a sparkling 12-metre infinity pool with direct beach access.

The main ground-floor pavilion houses the indoor lounge, dining room, kitchen and a twin bedroom, opening onto the pool deck and outdoor dining. Two elevated cliffside pavilions hold three further bedrooms, each with sea views and a shared balcony terrace; the largest is a romantic retreat with a four-poster bed and a dressing area leading to a soaking tub for two, a rain shower and a private garden.

Fully staffed with a private chef, the villa includes a welcome drink, daily breakfast and high-speed WiFi, with kayaks, yoga mats and a BBQ grill on request. The estate's own shoreline is rocky, but a short 200-metre stroll along the coast reaches a swimmable stretch of sand — and Fisherman's Village dining and shopping is a six-minute drive away.

place: Laem Sor, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Ayutthaya-Style Teakwood Beachfront Estate, Laem Sor
blurb: A barefoot-luxury estate sprawled across three acres of palm-dotted lawn running straight to a quiet, year-round swimmable beach — classic Ayutthaya-style teakwood pavilions and two converted rice barns, a beachside pool, a private tennis court and a waterfront sala.
detail:
Sprawled across three acres of rolling green dotted with swaying palms and manicured gardens that lead straight to a quiet, year-round swimmable beach, this is the private beachfront estate of your dreams. The charming Ayutthaya-style property is home to two luxuriously fitted teakwood pavilions housing seven bedrooms, plus two separate rice barns converted into individual bedrooms — gabled, tapered roofs and solid teak panelling showcasing the classic elegance of Thai architecture, antique furnishings gracefully balanced with contemporary pieces and bright pops of colour.

Every space, from the high-ceilinged living areas to the lush bedrooms, frames uninterrupted views of the pristine beach, turquoise water and nearby islands. Laze by the large beachside swimming pool or run the expansive lantern-lit lawns as you await an evening BBQ from your private chef and wait staff, or head to the waterfront sala after a game on the private tennis court. From the master Sairee Suite to the antique 'Big Barn' honeymoon suite, interconnected king rooms and children's bunk rooms, the home flexes from four to nine bedrooms for extended families and large groups.

Kayaks, table tennis, a yoga area and a scenic morning walk uphill to the nearby Wat Kao Chedi temple round out the stay, and the estate is a celebrated tropical wedding venue for up to 120 guests. Fully staffed with a villa manager, private chef and housekeeping, with a welcome drink, daily breakfast and WiFi throughout.

place: Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Bophut Hilltop Villa with Horizon Infinity Pool
blurb: A modern nine-bedroom retreat set high on Koh Samui's northernmost headland above Tongson Bay — open-plan living that dissolves into an infinity pool and sun deck, a circular sunken sala set within a shallow pool, and breathtaking sunrises and sunsets over the northeast coast.
detail:
At the exclusive northernmost point of Koh Samui stands an elegant modern retreat, raised high above Tongson Bay with sweeping views over the island's northeast coast — a rare aspect that catches both Samui's famous sunrises and its sunsets. Open-plan volumes link indoor and outdoor living effortlessly, opening onto a breezy terrace, an infinity pool and a sun deck dressed with semi-submerged sunbeds, double daybeds and oversized umbrellas.

The signature gesture is a distinctive circular sunken seating sala set within a shallow pool at the terrace edge — the ideal spot for sunset drinks, games or quiet ocean-gazing — set beside a circular decorative helipad deck conceived for sunset events and photographs (ornamental, not an operational landing pad). Outdoor dining sits beneath a cantilevered canopy at a sixteen-seat table with its own service bar and lounge, while the open-plan living and dining room pairs sleek interiors with a 90-inch screen and a handcrafted table for ten.

Nine en-suite bedrooms across three floors — seven original suites plus two newer additions and a dedicated children's room — host up to twenty adults and a child. Exclusive amenities run deep: a private cinema, an adults' games lounge with open bar, a fully equipped gym, a sea-view sauna for four, an ice bath, an in-villa massage bed and an outdoor space for Muay Thai or yoga over the sea — all underpinned by full backup power and a resident manager, private chef and housekeeping, fifteen minutes from the airport and a short walk to Thong Sai Beach.

place: Maenam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Ten-Pavilion Hilltop Panoramic Estate, Maenam
blurb: A 14,400 m² hilltop estate of ten individually designed pavilions cascading down a Maenam ridge, wrapped in 180-degree views across the Gulf to Koh Phangan — twin infinity pools, a spa, cinema, tennis and squash courts, wine cellar and a grand piano lounge.
detail:
Crowning a private ridgeline above Maenam on Koh Samui's quieter north coast, this is one of the island's grandest private estates — ten individually conceived villas and pavilions spread across roughly 14,400 m² of landscaped hillside, each framing an unbroken 180-degree panorama over the Gulf of Thailand toward Koh Phangan. Completed in 2024, the architecture steps down the slope so that sea, sky and infinity water meet from almost every vantage point.

The estate is built for celebration and slow luxury in equal measure. Twin infinity pools — a 25-metre and a 40-metre — anchor the central terraces, with a full spa, a state-of-the-art gym and a yoga deck for wellness; a private cinema, a gaming room, a wine cellar and a grand-piano lounge for the evenings; and a tennis court, squash court and petanque for the active. Vast indoor-outdoor living and dining pavilions open completely to the breeze, with multiple show kitchens and chef's tables.

Ten en-suite bedrooms host up to twenty guests (and up to twenty-six with additional bedding), making it a singular setting for multi-generational gatherings, retreats and weddings. A full resident team — estate manager, private chefs, housekeeping and security — looks after every detail, with daily breakfast and the run of the grounds included.

place: Lipa Noi, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Thai-Japanese Beachfront Villa with Three-Tier Pool, Lipa Noi
blurb: An architect-designed beachfront villa on Lipa Noi's quiet west coast where modern Thai meets Japanese calm — a cascading three-tier infinity pool stepping toward the sea, a Japanese-style spa, a home theatre and six serene en-suites named for sea, water and sky.
detail:
Conceived by architect Riccardo Tossani as a village of Irimoya-roofed pavilions on a gentle beachfront slope, this Lipa Noi retreat is a harmony of modern Thai warmth and Japanese restraint — built around Omotenashi, the spirit of wholeheartedly looking after one's guests. It opens directly to a paradise stretch of white sand and the calm turquoise of Samui's west coast, with uninterrupted views of the famous Five Islands in the heart of the Gulf of Thailand.

At its centre, a three-tier infinity pool descends like a quiet river toward the sea — a 12.8-metre main pool, a 17.9-metre reflection pool and a children's pool — edged by ten sun loungers and a jacuzzi for six. Days move between the 24-hour gym, the Japanese-style spa with two massage beds, the 85-inch home theatre, the atrium for yoga, and beach pursuits with transparent kayaks, paddleboards, water cycling and tennis.

Six glamorous en-suite bedrooms — Umi, Mizu, Kokoro, Sora and Raku — each take their cue from the sea and tropical life, several opening to the pool or beach, with the Ocean master enjoying a private beach-facing balcony. Fully staffed with a villa manager, private chef, housekeeping and an in-house masseuse, with welcome drinks and daily breakfast included.

place: Lipa Noi, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: White Beachfront Villa with Sunken Pool Library, Lipa Noi
blurb: A crisp white contemporary villa on a former coconut plantation along quiet Lipa Noi beach — six pavilion bedrooms, a 20-metre infinity-edge pool with an underwater window onto a sunken library, a beachside treehouse and an outdoor cinema under the stars.
detail:
Suriya means 'sunshine' in Thai, and this absolute-beachfront villa lives up to it — set on a former coconut plantation along Lipa Noi, regarded as Samui's most unspoilt and best swimming beach, with a sun-kissed stretch of sand, swaying palms and spectacular sunsets over the Ang Thong Marine Park and Five Islands. Almost entirely white and offset with vibrant colour accents, it reads as a stylish, contemporary retreat across a series of pavilions.

The villa's signature is a 20-metre infinity-edge pool whose underwater views can be enjoyed from a sunken library lined with books and board games — one of many quiet corners alongside a mezzanine lounge with a sunset bar and pool table, a spa room, a gym-and-games annex, and a beachside treehouse for shaded massages. Evenings turn to the outdoor cinema by the sand, with the sound of the waves rolling in behind your film.

Six en-suite bedrooms, each uniquely designed and inspired by the sea, host up to twelve guests; three open directly onto the pool deck and the spacious master enjoys a large bathtub and a garden that leads to the beach. Complimentary watersports and volleyball equipment, a beach-facing lawn and a celebrated wedding setting round out the estate, fully staffed with a villa manager, private chef and housekeeping.

place: Chaweng Noi, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: A49 Floating Glass House, Chaweng Noi
blurb: A glass house by celebrated Thai studio A49 that appears to float above the Chaweng Noi hillside — Balau-wood ceilings and decks, B&B Italia interiors, a 17-metre infinity pool over the bay, plus a basement entertainment den, spa, sauna and Technogym gym.
detail:
Live like a debonair Bruce Wayne in this stunning example of tropical modernist architecture, designed by celebrated Thai studio A49. Spanning 2,800 m² across four stepped levels, the glass house appears to float above the hill slopes, its ceilings and decking clad in local Balau wood as a nod to the tropical context, with a 17-metre infinity pool facing Chaweng Noi Beach and panoramic views of white sand, crystal water and distant islands. Named for the coconut (kelapa) trees around it, it blends into spectacular surroundings.

The living and dining areas are tastefully furnished with B&B Italia, Poltrona Frau and other designer brands, opening to an outdoor dining area and kitchen for barbecues by a private chef, with Alfred-like butler service throughout. Below, an entertainment den, a media room, a spa with Sunlighten sauna and steam room, and a private gym fitted with Technogym equipment connect to a sleek nomad-friendly workspace with high-speed internet.

Four spacious bedrooms each have an en-suite and floor-to-ceiling glazing onto the view, arranged across the lower floors with the infinity pool, dining and living on the entry level. Fully staffed with a villa manager, private chef and gardener, with daily breakfast, a welcome fruit basket and a curated wine list, minutes from Chaweng's beaches, restaurants and nightlife.

features.l: 17 m infinity pool over the bay

place: Laem Sor, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Pavilion-Wrapped T-Pool Beachfront Villa, Laem Sor
blurb: A study in laid-back modern-tropical luxury by architect David Clarke on a quiet Laem Sor beachfront — a grand double-storey pavilion above a T-shaped pool wrapped by pavilions and courtyards, with a sunken poolside dining sala, spa and home theatre.
detail:
Designed by renowned architect David Clarke, Ban Mekkala is a study in laid-back sophistication and modern tropical luxury. Every feature of this Laem Sor beachfront retreat has been considered — from the stunning entrance and the grand double-storey pavilion to the azure seascape framed beyond, the pavilion-wrapped T-shaped pool, a home theatre and six air-conditioned en-suite bedrooms dressed in three distinct styles. The main living space sits on the upper storey of the central pavilion as an all-in-one TV salon, dining room, gourmet kitchen and open-air balcony, while the ground floor reads as a cloistered sanctuary around the central pool and courtyard garden.

Six bedrooms including two master suites each form a private haven with a king bed, entertainment system and en-suite bathroom — some with outdoor courtyards, others with walk-in showers and bathtubs, several with direct access to the pool or sea. A stone path leads to a sunken poolside pavilion for feasts whipped up by your personal Thai chef, set beside a 20-metre pool with a jacuzzi and shallow children's end.

The single-level layout makes it ideal for families, and the quiet beachfront — steps from the sand, near Kamalaya — suits reunions, weddings and groups. A spa room with massage beds, a steam room, kayaks, paddleboards and bicycles complete the offering, with the villa fully staffed by a manager, private chef and housekeeper and a daily breakfast included.

place: Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Wide-Frontage Five-Islands Pavilion Villa, Taling Ngam
blurb: A minimalist two-bedroom pavilion villa with the widest sea frontage of its estate on Koh Samui's quiet south-west coast — full 180-degree views of the Five Islands and Ang Thong Marine Park, an 11.6-metre infinity pool, and direct beach access for spectacular sunsets.
detail:
One of five villas within The Headlands, this private escape blends seamlessly with the tropical nature around it, set apart by the widest ocean frontage on the estate — an uninterrupted 180-degree panorama of the famous Five Islands and the Ang Thong National Marine Park beyond. Arranged across two minimalist pavilions, it suits honeymooners and small families alike, with a convertible study giving a flexible third bedroom.

Folding glass walls open the open-plan living, dining and kitchen pavilion completely to the sea breeze and an effortless indoor-outdoor flow, while signature neutral tones keep the focus on the view. Multiple lounge zones — an upper terrace, a sun deck and a shaded relaxation area — surround an 11.6-metre infinity pool that appears to spill toward the islands, with a Thai massage spot on the deck.

Direct beach access leads to a quiet shore for snorkelling and kayaking, with a nearby jetty for sunset moments and the InterContinental resort along the coast for dining. Fully staffed with a villa manager (chef on request), the stay includes a welcome drink, daily breakfast, return airport transfers and beachside restaurant shuttles.

place: Choeng Mon, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Sleek White Futuristic Hillside Villa, Choeng Mon
blurb: A luminous white architectural statement cascading down three floors of a lush Choeng Mon hillside — retro-futuristic interiors with surrealist gilded figures, 180-degree ocean panoramas, an 18-metre infinity pool, a private cinema, gym, sauna and spa.
detail:
Gazing over the clear blue ocean, this sleek white villa cascades over three floors down a lush Samui elevation, creating an irresistibly stylish, soothing ambiance with a few whimsical surprises — check the gilded characters scaling the living-room walls. Built in 2023 across 1,450 m², it is a sublime study in modern aesthetics, where retro-futuristic elements meet natural materials and surrealist modern art, and 180-degree ocean panoramas follow you at every turn.

The living room centres on a circular sofa that reads futuristic and retro-chic at once, opening fully to the poolside deck or sealing behind glass; the adjoining dining area seats ten beside an open kitchen with wine fridge and barbecue. The 18-metre infinity pool seems to blend straight into the sea, ringed by beige sun beds and parasols worthy of any beach club. A private cinema with PlayStation, a media room, a gym/games room with table tennis, and a spa with massage bed, sauna and steam room round out the indulgences.

Four light-filled en-suite bedrooms are split across the three floors, each with full-wall glazing onto the ocean, king beds and ensuite bathrooms — the top-floor suite connecting to a study. Fully staffed with a villa manager, private chef, butlers, housekeepers and security, with daily breakfast, welcome drinks and return airport transfers, minutes from Choeng Mon's beach and the five-star resorts of the north-east cape.

features.l: 18 m infinity pool over the sea

place: Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Five-Islands-View Pavilion Villa, Taling Ngam
blurb: A minimalist two-pavilion villa on the quiet south-west coast, framing 180-degree views of the Five Islands and Ang Thong Marine Park — folding glass walls, a 7.3-metre infinity pool, a shady Banyan tree and direct beach access for unforgettable sunsets.
detail:
One of five villas within The Headlands, this private four-bedroom escape blends seamlessly with the tropical nature around it — unmatched in privacy, minimalist luxury and breathtaking sea views. Designed across two levels and two pavilions, it faces the famous Five Islands and Ang Thong National Marine Park, making it a magical backdrop for vibrant sunsets, and is equally suited to honeymooners or families with children.

The pavilions hold four en-suite bedrooms in signature neutral tones, a large open-plan living and dining area and a fully equipped kitchen, with the folding glass doors opening both pavilions to the cool sea breeze and an effortless indoor-outdoor flow. Lounge areas abound — a circular sofa on the upper terrace, a sun deck and atrium, a lower lounge for napping in the sun, and a 7.3-metre infinity pool with a traditional Thai massage spot on the deck beside it, all shaded by a magnificent Banyan tree.

Direct beach access leads to a quiet shore for snorkelling and kayaking, with a jetty nearby for sunset and the InterContinental resort just along the coast for dining. The villa is fully staffed with a villa manager (and chef on request), with a welcome drink, daily breakfast, return airport transfers and beachside restaurant shuttles included.

features.l: Shaded by a grand Banyan tree

place: Laem Noi Beach, Bang Por, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Three-Pavilion Beachfront Villa, Bang Por
blurb: A serene single-storey beachfront villa composed as three minimalist pavilions on the golden sand of Laem Noi, Bang Por — set in a hidden bay beside the Four Seasons and the season-three White Lotus filming site, with a 14-metre saltwater infinity pool over the sea.
detail:
Nestled in a hidden bay on Koh Samui's quiet north shore — right next to the filming site of The White Lotus season three and the Four Seasons Resort — this elegant modern villa is secreted away from the hustle yet close to nearby amenities. The striking single-floor property is composed as three separate pavilions, comfortably accommodating up to six adults and a child across its three bedrooms, surrounded by lush tropical forest and rustling palms with breathtaking views of a neighbouring island.

Contemporary design keeps simplicity at its core: an open living area flows to an indoor dining space and open kitchen, opening out to a sun deck, an outdoor dining area with BBQ, and a seating area by the pool. The 14-metre salt-water infinity pool is ringed by eight sun-loungers with a shallow kid-friendly end, set right on the soft, tranquil sands of Laem Noi Beach — step straight from the deck to the sea, or take the two-person kayak out along the coast toward Nikki Beach and the Four Seasons.

The villa sits within a small, secure estate of five beachside villas with a guarded entrance, 24-hour CCTV and safety deposit boxes. Each bedroom is en-suite and air-conditioned, with a 75-inch Smart TV, sound system and high-speed WiFi throughout. Two staff are permanently on-site with daily breakfast included, and a private chef, yoga and tailored tours can be arranged on request.

features.l: On the sand at Laem Noi Beach
Beside Four Seasons & White Lotus bay

place: Santikhiri Estate, Na Muang, Laem Set, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Cliff-Cascade Four-Storey Sea-View Villa, Laem Set
blurb: An extraordinary four-bedroom villa built into a lush rocky cliff in the exclusive Santikhiri Estate — its living spaces cascade down four storeys of timber decks and stone terraces to a waterfall plunge pool, with a 180-degree view across the Gulf of Siam.
detail:
Built into a lush hillside in the exclusive Santikhiri Estate, this extraordinary four-bedroom villa commands a breathtaking 180-degree panorama across the Gulf of Siam. The 900 m² property is designed to cascade down toward the ocean, its living spaces following the natural slope of the cliff: a series of timber decks and stone terraces descends over four storeys to a deck with a private plunge pool, a man-made waterfall and sunbeds, while a separate platform doubles as a yoga deck and sunset lounge — every room thoughtfully integrated with the landscape.

The interiors are seriously chic and entirely un-templated — no two spaces alike. Floor-to-ceiling glass doors invite the outdoors in, and vintage and designer furnishings sit alongside carefully curated artworks for a unique, welcoming atmosphere throughout. Guests share an open-plan living room with a projector for movie nights and a SONOS sound system, a minimalist kitchen, an outdoor bar, an outdoor wet kitchen and an al-fresco dining area for up to eight.

Four stylish en-suite bedrooms each open to a private balcony, with two massage beds and a yoga deck for wellness, and a communal estate pool a short walk up the hill. Fully staffed with a villa manager, housekeeper and handyman, the stay includes a welcome drink and daily breakfast, with a private chef, in-villa spa and tailored tours available on request — a short drive from Lamai Beach and the Kamalaya wellness sanctuary.

place: Bophut Hills, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Vaulted-Pavilion Hillside Villa, Bophut Hills
blurb: A five-bedroom hillside villa defined by a single soaring, wood-lined vaulted pavilion — its living level runs almost the full length of the house behind bi-folding glass on both sides, framing palm-clad valleys, Bophut bay and the offshore islands above a 20-metre infinity pool.
detail:
A slice of unmatched tropical elegance in the Bophut Hills, this five-bedroom villa centres on a vast, elevated living and dining pavilion that runs almost the entire length of the property beneath a soaring, wood-lined vaulted ceiling. Bi-folding glass doors on both sides open the room completely, ensuring constant panoramic views across palm-clad valleys and out to the bay of Bophut and the offshore islands, while a covered balcony with all-weather chairs runs the full length of the pavilion above the garden and pool.

A pedestal table for ten anchors the dining area beside an open-plan kitchen with island breakfast bar, top-of-the-range appliances and a built-in wine cooler; the lounge is layered with deep upholstered sofas, a rustic coffee table, a Smart TV and a modern chandelier. Stairs on both sides lead down to three king guest bedrooms that look across the garden, pool and view, each with an en-suite rain-shower bathroom along a covered walkway, with a lawn extending to the wide pool terrace.

The 20-metre infinity pool has sunken stools at a swim-up bar set within a covered sala with dining bench seats. The villa's two mirror-image master suites — one opening directly onto the pool terrace, one above — each carry their own vaulted wooden ceiling, dressing area, twin washbasins, rain shower and a terrazzo bathtub by an ocean-facing window. Fully staffed with daily breakfast and a covered carport, set just a short drive from Fisherman's Village.

place: Sunset Cove Estate, Plai Laem, Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Oceanfront Five-Bedroom Sunset Villa, Plai Laem
blurb: A newly refurbished oceanfront villa on the north-east tip of Koh Samui, in the gated Sunset Cove Estate opposite Six Senses — built over four levels for uninterrupted bay and Koh Phangan views, with a 14-metre saltwater infinity pool, gym, games room and a lawn path down to the sea.
detail:
Ideally located on the north-eastern tip of Koh Samui in the exclusive Sunset Cove Estate — opposite the renowned Six Senses Samui — this magnificent, newly refurbished oceanfront villa hosts up to 10 adults and 4 children across five double bedrooms plus a children's bunk room. Built over four levels, each offers uncompromising views of the sea, the local bays and the hills of neighbouring Koh Phangan; the entrance crosses a koi-carp pond before the ocean view snaps sharply into focus.

The sea-facing bedrooms have king beds, floor-to-ceiling windows, smart TVs and 'secret' wardrobe-hidden bathrooms, with two pavilions cleverly arranged as family suites that connect to an adjoining room or the kids' bunk room. The heart of the home is a full-width, open-plan living level behind floor-to-ceiling glass: cozy sofas with an 85-inch 8K TV, a dining table for 12, a breakfast bar, and a superbly equipped kitchen with twin islands, twin fridge-freezers and a chilled wine cellar — plus a separate Thai kitchen for the staff. An air-conditioned gym with a Pilates reformer, a pool table, a home office and even a telescope for the star-filled sky round out the level.

The travertine terrace takes in Plai Laem bay, the Big Buddha, Bangrak and Fisherman's Village, with built-in shade screens, alfresco dining and a Weber BBQ. The 14-metre saltwater infinity pool has swim-up stools at one end and a shallow play area at the other; below, a grassy lawn and a paved path over ancient rocks lead to the sea, where two double kayaks await for the ten-minute paddle to tiny Koh Som. Served by a Thai chef, villa manager and team, with daily breakfast and airport transfers — and licensed for small weddings with a clear stage set in the pool.

features.l: Oceanfront · lawn path to the sea

place: Plai Laem, Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Beachfront Pool Villa on Plai Laem Shore
blurb: A contemporary beachfront villa set directly on a private white-sand beach in a gated Plai Laem community — three sea-facing queen suites, a full-width infinity pool with 180-degree Gulf views, and steps straight down to the sand and the estate's kayaks.
detail:
The experience of this beachfront villa is one of absolute luxury, where the sea is always in view. Descend the dramatic staircase to your seaside oasis with several comfortable seating areas, and lounge in a private sala no more than three steps from the shores of the Gulf of Thailand. The villa sits directly on a private beach within an exclusive gated community with 24-hour security, with kayaks waiting on the sand and a fully equipped gym a short stroll away.

The large infinity pool is framed by a broad deck, luxurious sunbeds and a sofa; alternatively, relax in the great room with designer Meridiani furnishings imported from Italy, opening through a wall of glass doors to a full 180-degree sea view. A large interior movie room offers a quiet retreat with Netflix and PlayStation, and converts into a fourth queen bedroom for extra guests.

Upstairs, three large queen bedrooms each provide a private sanctuary, fully soundproofed with black-out blinds and a private sea-facing balcony, finished with natural-latex mattress toppers and 100% cotton sheets. The stay includes daily cleaning and turndown, free breakfast made to order, airport transfers and an on-demand concierge — with a private chef available on request.

place: Plai Laem, Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Elevated Sea-View Terrace Villa, Plai Laem
blurb: An elevated 'tree-house' terrace villa set back from the shore in a gated Plai Laem estate — designed by Gary Fell so the sea is visible from everywhere, with a full-width infinity pool, 180-degree views, and a secluded sea-facing master suite.
detail:
An exclusive retreat from the hectic noise of the island, this terrace villa is your private modern tree house, set on the second row above the shoreline for sweeping, elevated sea views. The interior is a testament to the architectural genius of Gary Fell — not only can you see the sea from everywhere, but the boundaries between home and tropical garden seem to blur. Guests still enjoy full access to the estate's private beach, kayaks and fully equipped gym just below.

The entry floor opens to a great room with seating for ten, two large sofas and a full kitchen with full-size appliances and a stocked mini bar, all framed by a wall of glass doors that give a full 180-degree sea view and open onto a large infinity pool and patio. The crown of the home is the enormous secluded master on the lower floor, closest to the sea, with an indoor seating area, an extra-large private balcony and a sofa that converts to a second bed.

Two further queen bedrooms upstairs each have an en-suite, walk-in rain shower, wide-screen Netflix TV and a private sea-facing balcony — all fully soundproofed with black-out blinds, natural-latex mattress toppers and 100% cotton sheets. Daily cleaning and turndown, breakfast made to order, airport transfers and concierge are included, with a private chef on request.

place: Plai Laem, Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Twelve-Bedroom Beachfront Estate, Plai Laem
note: Whole estate · book all four villas
blurb: The entire gated estate — four architect-designed villas totalling twelve bedrooms, two beachfront and two elevated for sea views, sharing a private white-sand beach, a full gym and kayaks. Built for weddings, retreats and multi-family gatherings.
detail:
Take over the whole estate: four brand-new, architect-designed villas in an exclusive gated community on Plai Laem, sharing a private white-sand beach with 24-hour security. Two villas sit directly on the beach with steps to the sand, and two are elevated on the terrace above for sweeping 180-degree sea views — together they hold twelve queen bedrooms (each convertible for extra guests) and comfortably sleep up to 24 adults plus children.

Every villa has its own full-width infinity pool, a great room with seating for ten, a full kitchen and designer interiors, while the estate shares a fully equipped gym, kayaks on the beach and beautifully landscaped gardens. The scale and layout make it ideal for weddings, corporate retreats, wellness groups and large multi-family holidays — gather everyone together or give each family its own private villa.

The stay is fully serviced: daily cleaning and turndown, breakfast made to order each morning, complimentary airport transfers, all linens and towers, and an on-demand concierge and personal experience manager to plan activities, restaurants and events. Private chefs, in-villa massage and a low-cost private shuttle are available on request — an effortless, celebratory beachfront takeover on Koh Samui's north-east coast.

place: Plai Laem, Choeng Mon, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Monumental Eight-Bedroom Hillside Estate, Plai Laem
blurb: An eight-bedroom architectural masterpiece spanning two plots — the largest built-up villa on its hillside estate — with an expansive infinity pool, sunrise-and-sunset panoramas over the Gulf, two kitchens, a spa room, cinema and gym, built for grand celebrations.
detail:
An eight-bedroom architectural masterpiece that combines dramatic scale with refined design. Spanning two plots — the largest in the estate — it offers an unparalleled setting for both private escapes and corporate gatherings, its commanding position capturing panoramic views of both sunrise and sunset over the Gulf, making every occasion unforgettable.

The expansive infinity-edge pool and sweeping terraces create the centrepiece for outdoor life, while shaded salas and gardens extend the spaces for relaxation or large group events. The scale of the villa makes it equally suited to family vacations, weddings, wellness retreats and incentive trips — entertainment and functionality in balance.

Two fully equipped kitchens and a bar support catered events and private-chef dining, while a dedicated cinema, games room and private gym provide leisure and team-building, and a spa treatment room adds wellness to the mix. Each of the eight en-suite bedrooms is a private retreat with generous proportions, elegant bathrooms and panoramic outlooks — ten bathrooms in total, accommodating larger groups with ease, all under a fully staffed, ultra-luxury service.

place: Ban, Mae Nam, Maenam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Sea-View Pool Villa in Maenam
blurb: A modern five-bedroom tropical sanctuary in Maenam on Koh Samui's quiet north shore — a striking 16-metre L-shaped infinity pool angled for sea and sunset views, an open-air sala, gym and games, set on a leafy 1,600 m² plot near Bang Po beach.
detail:
Nestled in the enchanting Maenam district on Koh Samui's tranquil north coast, this modern five-bedroom villa is a tropical sanctuary blending luxury, comfort and awe-inspiring natural surroundings across an expansive 1,600 m² plot. Inside, five exquisitely furnished bedrooms each carry a private en-suite, with a dedicated kids' room of two bunk beds sleeping up to four children — comfortable for families and groups alike.

The villa's centrepiece is a striking 16-metre L-shaped infinity pool, thoughtfully positioned to maximise mesmerising views of the glistening sea and the island's celebrated sunsets. An open-air sala invites quiet moments amid the greenery, while a well-equipped gym, a foosball table, board games and a Devialet sound system keep every kind of guest entertained. High-speed WiFi covers the property, and each bedroom is finished with a safety box and refined details.

A dedicated team of three including a private chef crafts culinary masterpieces to your taste, with daily housekeeping, a complimentary daily breakfast and turndown service. Minutes from Bang Po beach and a short drive from Fisherman's Village and Santiburi golf, it is an oasis of calm where panoramic sea views meet warm, attentive island hospitality.

place: Laem Sor, Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Sea-View Villa in Laem Sor
blurb: A serene six-bedroom hillside villa above Laem Sor on Koh Samui's quiet southern coast — Siamese-accented white interiors under high arched ceilings, an L-shaped infinity pool over the Gulf, a Balinese sala, and stone steps straight down to a private beach.
detail:
Descend a stone staircase and you're greeted by a sanctuary wrapped in lush greenery and a vista of seemingly endless cerulean water — a tropical hideaway atop the unmarred hillside of Laem Sor on Koh Samui's southern coast, a short drive from the restaurants and beach of Lamai. Inside, a warm and inviting ambiance unfolds: traditional Siamese adornments set against crisp white walls and high arched ceilings, with wide cushioned couches indoors and comfortable wooden seating out.

The heart of the home is an L-shaped infinity pool that seems to spill toward the Gulf of Thailand, framed by uninterrupted views over the neighbouring Thong Krut fishing village. Six en-suite bedrooms — two masters, three guest rooms and a self-contained studio apartment — sleep up to 12 adults and 2 children, each finished with terraces, dressing areas and bathtubs or rain showers, ideal for families and gatherings.

A Balinese outdoor sala, extensive terracing, a fully equipped professional kitchen, a gym, and a beachfront barbecue area round out the villa, with kayaks and paddleboards for the water. Right at the edge of the property, stone steps lead down to a private beach of rock pools and formations. A team of four including a private chef looks after every detail, with daily breakfast, housekeeping and a villa manager to arrange island excursions.

place: Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Five-Bedroom Beachfront Villa on Bophut Shore
blurb: A stylish five-bedroom beachfront villa on the tranquil shore of Bophut — sweeping ocean views and direct beach access, a 16-metre free-form infinity pool, a poolside sala, and airy interiors layered with Jim Thompson fabrics and natural textures.
detail:
Set along the tranquil coast of Bophut, this contemporary villa offers a sanctuary of coastal calm — sweeping ocean vistas and direct beach access for an unforgettable getaway. Hidden behind a private entrance, the shoreline retreat comfortably accommodates up to ten guests, its airy interiors blending organic textures, Jim Thompson fabrics and soft neutral tones that draw the shimmering sea inside.

Every space is crafted to inspire rest — from the open-concept living and dining room to the outdoor terrace with its shaded sala and BBQ facilities, made for grilling beside the 16-metre free-form infinity pool. Five en-suite bedrooms provide a soothing refuge for guests of all ages: four feature king beds, indoor jacuzzis and bathtubs and a compact mini-pantry, while a family room with twin beds and a flatscreen TV gives children their own comfortable space.

Finished with a 65-inch Smart TV, a Sonos sound system, a media room and high-speed WiFi throughout, the villa is supported by four attentive staff including a private chef, with daily breakfast, housekeeping and turndown. Just minutes from Bophut's Fisherman's Village and a short drive from Samui Airport, it is an effortless blend of refinement and beachfront relaxation.

place: Narayan Heights, North Chaweng, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Nine-Bedroom Sea-View Estate in North Chaweng
blurb: A contemporary nine-bedroom estate of two architect-designed villas in the gated Narayan Heights community above North Chaweng — twin saltwater infinity pools, a cinema, gym, spa room and rooftop terrace, framed by sweeping sea views.
detail:
Set in the prestigious Narayan Heights gated community in North Chaweng, this contemporary estate blends tropical elegance with modern luxury and serene seclusion — an ideal escape for families or groups seeking a refined island retreat. It comprises two beautiful four-storey villas, Emerald and Ruby, which together form a sprawling nine-bedroom residence accommodating up to 20 guests, including four expansive master suites, four guest bedrooms and a dedicated children's room.

Surrounded by lush foliage and sweeping sea views, the villas feature 14-metre saltwater infinity pools with integrated kids' areas, jacuzzi, and spacious decks with plush loungers and shaded seating for sun-soaked days and sunset cocktails. Indoors, air-conditioned living areas open into sleek kitchens — each villa with a fully equipped kitchen plus a separate chef's kitchen — and multiple indoor and outdoor dining spaces seat up to 20 for everything from casual breakfasts to celebratory feasts.

Lifestyle spaces lift the experience further: a cinema room with state-of-the-art audio, a fitness room with LifeFitness equipment, a dedicated spa room with custom massage tables, a rooftop terrace and a kids' play garden. A villa manager and private chef anchor the service, with daily breakfast and housekeeping, just minutes from Chaweng Beach yet a peaceful, design-forward haven to return to at day's end.

place: Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Balinese Beachfront Suite Estate in Bo Phut
blurb: A Balinese-style beachfront estate on Bo Phut's white sands — eight en-suite suites (five beachfront with private jacuzzis), a 16-metre pool with waterfall fountains, spa, gym, wine cellar and beach-side sala bar, with a ten-strong team and private chef.
detail:
Situated along the pristine shores of Koh Samui, this beachfront estate is a seamless fusion of Balinese sophistication and tropical tranquility — top-of-the-line amenities paired with exclusive design and service. Its Balinese layout sets the stage for an immersive experience: a central courtyard graced by the azure sea and powdery white sand, wrapped in verdant foliage, inviting lounges and shaded enclaves, with a captivating pool of waterfall-style fountains at its heart.

The estate is divided into five beachfront suites — each with a private jacuzzi and direct beach access — and three suites with serene private gardens, eight en-suite bedrooms in all. A fully equipped gym and a wellness room with two massage tables, robes and oils keep guests active and pampered, while the sala and bar area, with a table for up to 18 and a six-seat bar, is made for gatherings. An outdoor kitchen with a high-end gas barbecue lets the private chef cook amid the natural beauty.

A dedicated team of ten — personal manager, private chef, bartenders, housekeepers and security — attends to every need, with a 16-metre salt-treated pool, wine cellar, covered and beach lounges, and a movable big screen for meetings. Just 11 minutes from Samui Airport and minutes from Fisherman's Village, it is an idyllic seaside retreat where Balinese elegance meets tropical luxury.

place: Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: 180° Clifftop Sea-View Villa in Taling Ngam
blurb: An elevated beachfront villa on Koh Samui's quiet south-west coast, built around 180-degree views of the Five Islands — minimalist white interiors, suspended sea-facing king beds, a 16.5-metre infinity pool with jacuzzi and a private beach below.
detail:
Set on an elevated plot right on the beach in Taling Ngam, this villa makes you feel suspended in the air amid the wide tropical sky, with the ocean seemingly right under your feet. Built around a concept of 180-degree views from wherever you stand, its architecture is minimal and modern — white and beige tones creating a soothing, sophisticated, ultra-luxe atmosphere over a three-storey pavilion plus two separate bungalows.

The home sleeps up to ten adults and six children across five bedrooms and a bunk-bed children's room. Every adult bedroom centres on a king bed that appears to float, facing the blue sea, with floor-to-ceiling glass sliding doors opening to private balconies; one suite even has both indoor and outdoor rain showers and an outdoor tub beneath a tree. A 16.5-metre infinity pool with a jacuzzi sits on the edge of the property for sunset swims, with direct beach access to the private, unspoiled sand below.

Five full-time English-speaking staff, including an on-site chef cooking Thai and Western cuisine, look after the stay, with complimentary breakfast, a private concierge, two sea kayaks, paddleboards, a ping-pong table, a video projector and high-speed WiFi throughout. The ultimate modern luxury in a private piece of Koh Samui paradise, framed by the Five Islands and unbroken sunsets.

place: Jl. Karma Kandara, Ungasan, Kuta Selatan, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
title: Cloud Nine Ungasan — Clifftop Wellness Villa, Uluwatu
blurb: A newly built five-bedroom clifftop villa high on the Bukit Peninsula in Ungasan — three floors linked by a private glass elevator, a 20-metre pool, a sauna-and-ice-bath pavilion, rooftop hot tub, gym and yoga deck, fully staffed with a private chef and butlers.
detail:
Perched high on the cliffs of Uluwatu in Ungasan, Cloud Nine Ungasan is a newly built, fully-staffed five-bedroom villa designed for up to ten guests — a refuge where the stay itself becomes the destination. Set across 1,600 m² of lush hillside at the southernmost point of the Bukit Peninsula, it offers a quieter side of Bali while staying close to the island's best-known spots: Melasti Beach is nearby, Garuda Wisnu Kencana is 5.8 km away, and Uluwatu Temple a 9 km drive.

Spread across three floors and connected by a private glass elevator, the villa is built to give groups room to gather and room to breathe. Wellness is taken seriously: a 20-metre pool, a private sauna and ice-bath pavilion, a massage room, an air-conditioned gym, and an open-air yoga and meditation deck. Open-plan living and dining areas balance high ceilings, cool interiors and easy indoor-outdoor flow, with details that nod to local tradition — a Ramayana carving and a thatched-roof wellness pavilion.

For social moments, there's an indoor bar, a projector and retractable screen, a billiards table, a pizza oven and a wood-fired BBQ grill. The five en-suite bedrooms include a ground-floor king suite with terrace and swing chairs over the pool, three guest bedrooms on the second floor, and a top-floor primary with a private balcony and outdoor hot tub. Fully staffed with a villa manager, private chef, gardeners and butlers, Cloud Nine can also host private celebrations for up to 50 guests.

place: Berawa, Tibubeneng, North Kuta, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
title: Mandala Estate — Multi-Villa Group Retreat, Canggu
note: Per villa per night · book one or all
blurb: A designer multi-villa estate in the heart of Berawa — anchored by the five-bedroom Mandala Oasis with its rooftop cinema, swim-up-bar pool and gym, alongside three-bedroom Mandala Residences, for group travel that balances togetherness and space.
detail:
Mandala Estate invites you to experience Canggu in style, at your own pace and always in good company — group travel, elevated, where shared moments flow effortlessly alongside the luxury of personal space. Anchoring the estate is Mandala Oasis, a striking five-bedroom sanctuary where bold design meets barefoot elegance, with a rooftop cinema, a private gym and pilates room, an ice bath and sauna, and a 26-metre infinity pool with a swim-up bar.

Just steps away are Mandala Residences — a collection of three-bedroom villas that give your group more room to spread out yet stay connected, each with its own serene living and dining spaces and private pool. Whether you reserve a single villa or the entire estate, you enjoy seamless flexibility paired with attentive in-villa staff: book more villas to unlock more space and amenities, up to 17 guests across the whole estate.

Days unfold slowly here — mornings by the pool, leisurely communal lunches, and evenings that drift from one beautiful villa to the next. Best of all, you're perfectly placed in one of Bali's most sought-after enclaves: a stroll from vibrant restaurants and beach clubs along Berawa, and only a four-minute drive from the golden sands of Berawa Beach.

features.l: Five villas · book one or all
Up to 17 guests · 4 min to Berawa Beach

place: Pererenan, Mengwi, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
title: Akashi Residence — Sculptural Slide Villa, Canggu
blurb: An architectural masterpiece by Alexis Dornier in quiet Pererenan — open-air tropical living over three levels around a central atrium, where a silver sculptural water slide splashes into the pool below, with a gym, ice bath and yoga deck.
detail:
Raising the bar on the Bali villa experience, Akashi Residence is an architectural masterpiece that brilliantly strikes the balance between style and function. Located in quiet Pererenan, it offers an authentic slice of Bali without the big crowds — yet sits conveniently close to lively Canggu and the surf beaches of the island's west coast. Designed by renowned architect Alexis Dornier, this spectacular six-bedroom villa is perfect for groups of friends and extended families with kids of all ages.

The unique tropical design represents open-air living at its finest, with air-conditioned comfort whenever you need it. The central atrium is the social hub of the villa, its centrepiece a silver sculptural water slide that splashes into the swimming pool below. An abundance of living and entertainment spaces spreads over three levels, with each air-conditioned en-suite bedroom furnished with a king bed or two queens.

Beyond the headline slide, the villa is a wellness haven and entertainer's dream: a TV and media room with an 85-inch Smart TV, a pool table, a private gym, an ice bath, a yoga deck, a roofed poolside lounge, and two dining rooms with adjoining kitchens. A 17-metre pool, daily breakfast, private chef and full villa team round out a stay that has been featured by Australian Traveller, Lifestyle Asia and Tatler Asia.

place: Pererenan, Mengwi, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
title: Pantai Lima Estate — Three Beachfront Villas, Canggu
note: Whole estate · per villa per night
blurb: A four-acre beachfront estate of three standalone luxury villas — Ambra and Melissa on the water's edge, Mary against the rice fields — sharing a night-lit tennis court and a minute's boardwalk to the beach, each fully staffed with chefs and butlers.
detail:
Pantai Lima Estate comprises three standalone luxury villas extending across more than 1.6 hectares — four acres, the size of two football fields. Villa Ambra and Villa Melissa sit right on the water's edge, while Villa Mary is set back against the rice fields with sweeping views of the ocean and the river at its side. All three are just a minute's walk to the beach via a short boardwalk.

Book a single villa or the whole estate: together the three villas sleep up to 36 guests across as many as 15 bedrooms, making Pantai Lima ideal for large gatherings, corporate retreats, weddings and celebrations that need privacy and scale. Each villa offers its own private pool, expansive indoor-outdoor living and beautifully manicured gardens overlooking the black-sand beach.

The estate is headed by a villa manager, and each villa has its own dedicated team — chefs, butlers, attendants and security — for a hassle-free holiday. Shared facilities include a private tennis court with night lighting, while in-villa spa treatments, yoga and a full slate of tours can be arranged on request.

place: Pantai Lima, Pererenan, Mengwi, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
title: Villa Ambra — Beachfront Pool Villa, Pantai Lima
blurb: A five-bedroom beachfront villa on the water's edge at Pantai Lima — open ocean-view living over three levels, a spa room with daybed terrace, a basement gym and study, and direct steps to the black-sand beach, fully staffed with a private chef.
detail:
Villa Ambra sits right on the water's edge within the four-acre Pantai Lima Estate, a five-bedroom beachfront retreat arranged across three levels. The ground floor opens to indoor and outdoor living areas, two bedrooms, the kitchen, pool and a garden-side outdoor dining area; the second floor holds three further bedrooms including the master, plus a spa room with an open terrace and daybeds; and the basement adds an office/study and a fitness area.

The open indoor living area frames a beautiful ocean view, with an enclosed air-conditioned dining room beside the kitchen and generous poolside seating overlooking the sea. Each en-suite bedroom is air-conditioned with its own satellite TV, and the villa is well stocked for downtime with a Harman Kardon sound system, table tennis, backgammon and a library of books, games and puzzles.

Fully staffed with a private chef, attendants, gardener and security, Villa Ambra includes daily breakfast, a complimentary car with driver, and shared access to the estate's night-lit tennis court. In-villa massage, yoga on the villa's own mats, and a full slate of tours and activities can be arranged on request — a serene beachfront base a minute from the sand.

place: Pantai Lima, Pererenan, Mengwi, Badung, Bali, Indonesia
title: Villa Melissa — Beachfront Pool Villa, Pantai Lima
blurb: A freshly refurbished five-bedroom beachfront villa at Pantai Lima — open-plan living with surround sound over two levels, a poolside lounge and beachfront bale for private massage, with ocean views and direct steps to the black sand.
detail:
Villa Melissa is a five-bedroom beachfront villa within the four-acre Pantai Lima Estate, refreshed in 2024 and spread across two levels. The ground floor holds a semi-open indoor living area with surround sound, a fully equipped kitchen, enclosed air-conditioned dining, the master and two further bedrooms, plus the pool and garden; two more bedrooms sit on the upper level. Each en-suite bedroom has a Smart TV with Netflix and its own sound system.

The living spaces flow effortlessly to the outdoors — a poolside lounge and dining area with beach and ocean views, and a beachfront bale that makes a serene haven for private massages. With the sea just steps away across the estate's boardwalk, Melissa balances open-air Bali living with air-conditioned comfort throughout.

Fully staffed with a private chef, attendants, housekeepers, maintenance and security, the villa includes daily breakfast and shared access to the estate's night-lit tennis court. In-villa spa treatments, yoga, a chef shopping service and tours can all be arranged on request, making it an effortless beachfront base for families and groups.

place: Millionaire's Mile, Kamala, Kathu, Phuket, Thailand
title: The Aquila — Clifftop Estate, Millionaire's Mile
blurb: A secluded clifftop estate on Kamala's Millionaire's Mile — contemporary Asian design over a 12-bedroom retreat with two ocean-view infinity pools, direct sea access, a cinema, library, gym and spa, served by ten staff for up to 24 guests.
detail:
Perched on a secluded clifftop along Phuket's illustrious Millionaire's Mile in Kamala, The Aquila Villa is a masterpiece of luxury, seamlessly blending contemporary Asian sophistication with nature's raw beauty. Designed for discerning travellers seeking exclusivity and indulgence, this expansive 12-bedroom retreat offers an unparalleled escape in one of Thailand's most coveted destinations.

Set within an extensive estate, the villa strikes a perfect balance between indoor elegance and outdoor serenity. Two infinity pools invite guests to soak in uninterrupted ocean views, surrounded by sun-drenched terraces, alfresco dining spaces and a tranquil outdoor sala. Every detail is meticulously crafted, with twelve private bedrooms including a magnificent master suite designed as a sanctuary of its own and a family room with two adjoined bedrooms.

Beyond its setting, the villa is a haven of world-class amenities: a chic outdoor bar, a cinema room, a library, and an entertainment area with a pool table. Fitness and wellness enthusiasts enjoy a state-of-the-art gym, a dedicated spa room and direct sea access for a swim in the Andaman. Culinary excellence is effortless with a professional kitchen, wine cellar and BBQ facilities served by a private chef — all within a gated estate with 24-hour security, an elevator and a conference area.

place: Soi Lam Sai, Karon, Mueang Phuket, Phuket, Thailand
title: Villa Zai — 11-Bedroom Clifftop Estate, Kata-Karon
blurb: A modern 11-bedroom hillside hideaway on a headland between Kata and Karon — panoramic sea views, an infinity pool and jacuzzi, cinema, spa, gym, pickleball court and putting green, with a 16-strong staff for up to 24 guests.
detail:
Situated on a headland on Phuket's west coast between the beaches of Kata and Karon, Villa Zai is a luxurious modern hillside hideaway. The 11-bedroom property is designed with special attention to open spaces and indoor-to-outdoor elegance, with panoramic views of the sea, blending privacy with sophistication for guests who enjoy the finer things in life.

The expansive living room seats 20 against a backdrop of sea views and includes a billiards table convertible for table tennis, while a nearby dining room offers a terrace for all-day dining, a private bar and a poker table. The outdoor lounge invites guests to take in the scenery, and the infinity pool and jacuzzi are perfect for swims and soaks overlooking the hillside, alongside a generous sun deck.

There's no shortage of things to do: an in-villa spa, a golf putting green, an outdoor pickleball court, a fully-equipped gym, a cinema room and a karaoke and games setup. With capacity for up to 24 guests across 11 bedrooms — and a 16-strong staff with private parking for 20 cars — Villa Zai is built for families, friends and large groups celebrating in style.

place: Cape Yamu, Pa Klok, Thalang, Phuket, Thailand
title: Villa Amarasara — Beachfront Estate, Cape Yamu
blurb: A beachfront estate in the gated Cape Yamu community on Phuket's eastern coast — Oriental-modern architecture over 4,500 m², a 40-metre infinity pool above Phang Nga Bay, full-sized tennis court, cinema, golf simulator and six staff.
detail:
